title: machilus lenticellatus
intro: Machilus lenticellatus, also known as the "Yunnan bayberry" or "Bayberry tree", is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in southwestern China. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Machilus lenticellatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the Machilus lenticellatus tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
